data.title: feat(cli): change default format to text for inbox and history
data.description:
TOON format used 2.2x more bytes than text for message lists due to verbose dot-notation paths (messages.0.agent, messages.0.body, etc).

This change:
- Adds --format option to inbox and history commands with text as default
- Text is more token-efficient for AI agents reading message lists  
- TOON/JSON still available via --format toon or --format json
- Deprecated --json flag continues to work and overrides local default

Closes bd-wits

data.reason: Security review: No issues found. Changes modify default output format (toon→text) for inbox/history commands. Format selection uses clap's ValueEnum enum constraint - no free-form input. Output formatting change only; no injection, auth, access control, or resource exhaustion risks.
